trust.title: Trusted by modern transport and logistics companies
solutions.title: Track your fleet and reduce costs — with MyFleet
solutions.subtitle: Europe's modern cloud platform for fleet management. Some of the key capabilities:
solutions.tracking.title: Know where every vehicle is — 24/7
solutions.tracking.desc: Real-time tracking and tracing for trucks, vans and assets.
solutions.fuel.title: Reduce fuel and maintenance costs
solutions.fuel.desc: Monitor driver behavior and optimize vehicle usage.
solutions.workflow.title: Digitize your workflows
solutions.workflow.desc: Connect office, drivers and vehicles in one platform.
solutions.routes.title: Stay on the right routes
solutions.routes.desc: Assign drivers, vehicles and shifts efficiently.
solutions.service.title: Improve your service
solutions.service.desc: Manage requests, handovers and job updates seamlessly.
solutions.compliant.title: Stay compliant
solutions.compliant.desc: Track documents, licenses and regulatory deadlines.
testimonials.title: What our customers say
testimonials.1.quote: Fleet ERP simplified our daily operations. Drivers, vehicles and documents are finally in one place.
testimonials.1.name: Johannes Andersen
testimonials.2.quote: Leave requests and route approvals used to take hours. Now our office handles everything in minutes.
testimonials.2.name: Michael Cames
testimonials.3.quote: Compliance alerts alone saved us from multiple missed inspection deadlines this year.
testimonials.3.name: Ulf Tonne
split.liveTracking.title: Track your vehicles in real time
split.liveTracking.desc: Locate your vehicles on a clear map view and see whether they are parked or on the move. Choose the best-suited driver for a new job to minimize time on the road and keep service levels high.
split.liveTracking.imageAlt: Vehicle tracking on desktop, tablet and smartphone
split.planning.title: Complete more jobs every day
split.planning.desc: Seamless communication between your office and drivers improves workflow management. With accurate ETAs you keep customers satisfied and optimize daily assignments.
split.compliance.title: Stay compliant without the paperwork chaos
split.compliance.desc: Track license expiry dates, vehicle inspections, tachograph records and employment documents. Get alerts before deadlines and keep your fleet audit-ready.
driver.title: Manage Drivers In One Place
driver.desc: Store driver information, licenses, contracts, leave requests and accident history.
features.title: Everything you need to run your fleet
features.subtitle: From driver records to live tracking — manage every part of your operation in one place.
features.driver.title: Driver Management
features.driver.desc: Manage licenses, contracts, leave requests and driver records.
features.vehicle.title: Vehicle Management
features.vehicle.desc: Track vehicles, maintenance, inspections and handovers.
features.documents.title: Document Management
features.documents.desc: Store contracts, licenses and fleet documentation.
features.tracking.title: Live Tracking
features.tracking.desc: Monitor vehicle and driver locations in real time.
features.planning.title: Planning
features.planning.desc: Assign drivers, vehicles and shifts efficiently.
features.compliance.title: Compliance
features.compliance.desc: Track expiry dates and stay compliant with regulations.
savings.title: How much could you save?
savings.desc: See how fleet management can reduce fuel costs, admin time and compliance risks for your operation.
why.title: Why MyFleet?
cta.title: Ready to transform your fleet operation?
cta.desc: Book a demo today and speak with a fleet management specialist.
footer.tagline: Cloud fleet management for transport and logistics companies across Europe.
calculator.title: What does a missed deadline cost you?
calculator.subtitle: MOT, safety inspections, licence checks: as the operator you are personally liable. Calculate your fleet's fine risk in 30 seconds.
calculator.input.vehiclesHint: Trucks, vans, trailers — anything with compliance deadlines.
calculator.input.driversHint: Each driver requires regular licence verification.
calculator.input.method: How do you manage deadlines today?
calculator.input.methodHint: Be honest — this has the biggest impact on your risk.
calculator.result.perVehicle: ≈ {{amount}} per vehicle per year — what a single missed deadline can cost.
calculator.result.worstHint: In an accident with a missed safety inspection or invalid licence, insurer recourse and personal director liability may apply.
calculator.risks.hu.name: MOT / inspection overdue
calculator.risks.uvv.name: Safety inspection missed
calculator.risks.lizenz.name: Licence check missed
calculator.lead.title: Get a detailed PDF report
calculator.lead.subtitle: including a deadline checklist for your fleet.
calculator.lead.success: Thank you! Your email app will open — please send the request.
calculator.lead.mailBodyIntro: Please send me the detailed report including the deadline checklist.
calculator.assumptions.hu: MOT overdue: fines up to €175 per vehicle plus internal cost (re-inspection, downtime). Assumed incident probability per vehicle/year depends on management method.
calculator.assumptions.uvv: Missed safety inspection (DGUV rule 70): employers' liability fines up to €10,000; insurer recourse in case of damage.
calculator.assumptions.license: Missed licence check: if a driver operates without a valid licence, criminal proceedings (§21 StVG) and substantial penalties may follow.
calculator.assumptions.methods: Method factors: paper = full risk, Excel = slightly reduced, software = strongly reduced.
calculator.assumptions.disclaimer: Non-binding model calculation with indicative values — not legal advice. Actual fines depend on the individual case, fine catalogue and authority.
taxCalculator.title: 1% rule or logbook — what are you giving away?
taxCalculator.subtitle: Company cars used privately often cost more under the 1% rule. Calculate what a tax-compliant digital logbook saves your fleet.
taxCalculator.input.vehiclesHint: Only vehicles also driven privately (company cars).
taxCalculator.input.listPrice: Avg. gross list price per vehicle
taxCalculator.input.listPriceHint: New list price — basis for the 1% rule, even for used purchases.
taxCalculator.input.privateShareHint: What share of trips is actually private? The lower, the more a logbook pays off.
taxCalculator.input.taxRateHint: Marginal rate incl. surcharge — use 42% if unsure.
taxCalculator.result.totalLabel: Your estimated tax savings per year
taxCalculator.result.perVehicleSaving: ≈ {{amount}} per vehicle per year — at only {{percent}}% private use, the 1% rule costs significantly more.
taxCalculator.result.perVehicleNoSaving: At this high private share, the 1% rule is cheaper — move the slider to find the tipping point.
taxCalculator.lead.title: Personal PDF report
taxCalculator.lead.subtitle: including a tax-compliant logbook checklist.
taxCalculator.lead.success: Thank you! Your email app will open — please send the request.
taxCalculator.lead.mailBodyIntro: Please send me the personal tax report including the logbook checklist.
taxCalculator.assumptions.rule: 1% rule: 1% of gross list price per month as taxable benefit (commute trips not included — actual savings often higher).
taxCalculator.assumptions.logbook: Logbook: private share × annual vehicle total costs. Simplified: 15% of list price (depreciation) + €6,000 running costs/year.
taxCalculator.assumptions.savings: Savings: difference in taxable amounts × personal tax rate, never below 0.
taxCalculator.assumptions.disclaimer: Non-binding model calculation — not tax advice. Whether a logbook pays off depends on the individual case; discuss with your tax advisor.
deadlineChecker.title: When is your fleet really due?
deadlineChecker.subtitle: MOT, safety inspection and UVV — three deadlines per vehicle, zero overview on paper. Enter your vehicles and see what's due instantly. No account required.
deadlineChecker.result.empty: No vehicles yet — add your first one above.
deadlineChecker.lead.allOk: All clear — to keep it that way:
deadlineChecker.lead.subtitle: We'll remind you free by email — 3 months, 1 month and 1 week before each deadline.
deadlineChecker.lead.success: Enabled! You won't miss a deadline.
deadlineChecker.lead.mailBodyIntro: Please enable free email reminders for my vehicle deadlines:
deadlineChecker.assumptions.hu: MOT: Trucks over 7.5 t and heavy trailers: every 12 months. Light trucks/vans and cars: every 24 months. Simplified — first registration and special cases may differ.
deadlineChecker.assumptions.sp: SP (safety inspection): For heavy trucks additionally between MOT dates — simplified as 6 months after MOT here.
deadlineChecker.assumptions.uvv: UVV (DGUV rule 70): at least every 12 months by a qualified person for all commercial vehicles.
deadlineChecker.assumptions.disclaimer: Indicative values without guarantee — vehicle documents and legal requirements prevail. Data stays in the browser in this prototype.
